subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou seest how one of Thy handmaidens hath turned toward the Dayspring of Thy Cause and the Source of Thy tender mercies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری ان امه من امائک اقبلت الی مشرق امرک و مطلع عنایتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for women
